target: Third Loop
1. Classmates
Contact you? I don't mind if you just do it normally.
That's not it... Umm... I-I might not be able to contact you for a while.
Is that so?
I'm a bit busy…
I see, then I shouldn't contact you either--
It's okay if you message me, Shinpei-kun!
Huh? But you said you were busy…
That's… how do I say it…
(Oh right, Kaori-san is worried about Ushio...)

Thank you.
When things settle down, I'll contact you.
Yeah.
Hey!!
…Huh?
Welcome back, Shin-chan!! Good work on the long triiiiiiip!?
(No way…?)
(Is this what they call... <color=#GF_TIPS_058>deja vu</color>?)
Ah?
Mio!?
Eek!

Mio!
Are you okay!?
...Blub blub blub blub.
--Pah!
A-Ahahaha...! Sorry Shin-chan, for surprising you...!
…What are you doing?
I-I just got a little sweaty... so I thought I'd take a dip!!
I'm just glad you seem energetic...
(When Mio jumped in earlier... Even the pattern on her panties was the same.)
Mio, did you actually apply the brakes?
I wonder why... I thought I applied them properly, but I didn't stop.

(If the brakes didn't work…
Was it a bicycle malfunction?)
(The bicycle's <color=#GF_TIPS_089>brake wire</color> is snapped? No wonder they didn't work...)

(It doesn't look like it broke naturally.
Who in the world did this…)
(Anyway, I should pull Mio up first.)
Here, come on up. I'll lend you a hand.
…Thanks.
It really is salty... the sea.
2. Tampered Brakes
Are you okay...? I'm glad you don't seem hurt.
Huh? Uh, yeah!
Shin-chan, who is this...?

Hello.
I'm Kaori Koyuba.
It's been a while, right?
Koyuba-san...?
You forgot, didn't you?
I-I didn't forget! I'll remember it right now...!
That's what people usually call "forgetting."
It can't be helped. Kofune-san and I were in different grades.
Different grades…
Ah! Could it be... Onee-chan's classmate, Koyuba-san?
Thank goodness. You remembered me.
I remember! Your name!
Just her name... huh.
Sorry. It's a memory from when I was little, so it's not very clear...
No, it's fine! I'm the one who should apologize for making you worry.

Anyway, what are you going to do
with that soaked uniform?
I have a spare uniform at home, so it's fine.
Then let's head home.
So anyway, Koyuba-san. We'll be going now.
Sorry for all the commotion. Well then.
Ah, Kofune-san.
Umm... Would it be okay if I came to pay my respects once things have settled down?
Ah... Yes, I think Onee-chan would be happy too.
Well then, Ajiro-kun, see you later.
Yeah, see you.
Alright… let's go.
Hmm…
What's on your mind?
No... I just feel like I've seen Koyuba-san's face somewhere before?
Well, even if it was when you were little, you guys did go to the same school.

That's true, but…
More recently…

I don't get it, but let's go back first.
Alain's waiting, right?

Right.
Yeah, let's go back!
